articles.title: Harry Styles Makes a Triumphant Comeback in Amsterdam Tour Opener
articles.why: Harry Styles returning after three years of deliberate silence — opening a 169-date world tour with a dramatically reimagined sound — is a genuine pop culture reentry, and the Amsterdam opener sets the tone for a summer-long cultural conversation.
articles.hook: Three years gone. / Harry Styles is back in Amsterdam. / The setlist is nothing like you remember.

articles.title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
articles.why: The gap between AI winners and everyone else is widening inside the tech industry itself — this piece gives texture to the anxiety that the boom isn't broadly shared, even among the people building it.
articles.hook: The AI gold rush is real. / Not everyone's finding gold.
